name: Jansson's Temptation
recipeIngredient: 6 medium sized potatoes, peeled and cut into 2 x 1/4 inch strips
3/4 cup cream or half and half
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Keep potato strips in cold water to prevent discoloration.
3. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet and add onions; cook until soft but not brown, about 5 minutes.
4. Pat potatoes dry.
5. Arrange layers of potato, onion, and anchovies in a greased 1 1/2 to 2 quart baking dish. Begin and end with potatoes.
6. Dot casserole with butter and sprinkle with pepper and bread crumbs.
7. Pour cream around the casserole.
8. Bake in the center of the oven until the potatoes are tender and most of the liquid is absorbed, about 45-60 minutes.
Serves: 4-6
